description_en: BDC is Canada's only bank devoted exclusively to entrepreneurs. It offers business loans, venture capital, and advisory services tailored to Canadian SMEs.
description_fr: La BDC est la seule banque au Canada entièrement dédiée aux entrepreneurs. Elle offre des prêts aux entreprises, du capital de risque et des services-conseils.

products.description_en: Flexible term loans for equipment purchase, working capital, leasehold improvements
products.note_en: BDC uses a risk-based approach — weaker credit profiles can still qualify

products.description_en: For businesses less than 2 years old
products.co_lending_en: Often co-lent with Futurpreneur for younger entrepreneurs

products.description_en: Equity investments for high-growth technology companies

advisory_services.description_en: BDC advisors and consultants help with business planning, digital transformation, and management coaching

montreal_office.address: 5 Place Ville Marie, Suite 300, Montreal, QC H3B 2G2
